message:
Merge pull request #110 from kubestellar/fix/remove-branch-protection-trigger-from-scorecard

🐛 fix: Remove branch_protection_rule trigger from scorecard workflow

files.patch:
@@ -1,7 +1,6 @@
 name: OpenSSF Scorecard
 
 on:
-  branch_protection_rule:
   schedule:
     - cron: '0 6 * * 1'
   push:
